summary: Patient Data Encryption and Audit Trail Test
description: This test case validates that patient data is encrypted using AES-256 and audit trails are stored for every database change.
objective: Validate system compliance with FDA Part 11 and ISO 9001 requirements for encryption and audit trail storage.
prerequisites: System is configured to store patient records
Database is set up to track changes
test_steps: Step 1: Enter a new patient record
Step 2: Inspect the stored data to verify it is encrypted with AES-256
Step 3: Trigger a database change (e.g. update a patient's record)
Step 4: Observe system response to verify audit trail is created
expected_result: System behaves as per requirement, with patient data encrypted and audit trails stored for every database change.
acceptance_criteria: Audit trail is created for every database change
